allow: Bash(curl -s -X POST "http://localhost:3456/eval?target=712C6EC4F6B9372F9F84C86F7F1EF025" -d "Array.from\(document.querySelectorAll\('a, button, [role=tab], .ant-menu-item, span, div'\)\).filter\(el => el.textContent && el.textContent.trim\(\).length > 0 && el.textContent.trim\(\).length < 30\).map\(el => \({tag: el.tagName, text: el.textContent.trim\(\).substring\(0, 40\), class: el.className?.toString\(\)?.substring\(0, 50\)}\)\).slice\(0, 40\)")

Bash(curl -s -X POST "http://localhost:3456/eval?target=712C6EC4F6B9372F9F84C86F7F1EF025" -d "Array.from\(document.querySelectorAll\('input, textarea, .ant-modal input, .ant-modal textarea, .ant-input'\)\).map\(el => \({tag: el.tagName, type: el.type, placeholder: el.placeholder, name: el.name, id: el.id, class: el.className?.toString\(\)?.substring\(0,60\)}\)\).filter\(x => x.type !== 'hidden'\)")

Bash(curl -s -X POST "http://localhost:3456/eval?target=712C6EC4F6B9372F9F84C86F7F1EF025" -d "Array.from\(document.querySelectorAll\('.ant-modal input, .ant-modal textarea, .ant-modal .ant-select, .ant-form input, .ant-form textarea, input:not\([type=hidden]\), textarea, .ant-modal-body *'\)\).slice\(0,30\).map\(el => \({tag: el.tagName, type: el.type || '', placeholder: el.placeholder || '', text: el.textContent?.trim\(\)?.substring\(0,50\) || '', class: el.className?.toString\(\)?.substring\(0,80\)}\)\)")

Bash(curl -s -X POST "http://localhost:3456/eval?target=712C6EC4F6B9372F9F84C86F7F1EF025" -d "Array.from\(document.querySelectorAll\('input:not\([type=hidden]\), textarea, .ant-select-selector, .ant-input'\)\).map\(el => \({tag: el.tagName, type: el.type || '', placeholder: el.placeholder || '', value: el.value || '', id: el.id || '', name: el.name || '', maxlength: el.maxLength || ''}\)\)")

Bash(curl -s -X POST "http://localhost:3456/eval?target=712C6EC4F6B9372F9F84C86F7F1EF025" -d "var inp = document.getElementById\('graphName'\); var nativeInputValueSetter = Object.getOwnPropertyDescriptor\(window.HTMLInputElement.prototype, 'value'\).set; nativeInputValueSetter.call\(inp, 'yago_exp2'\); inp.dispatchEvent\(new Event\('input', { bubbles: true }\)\); 'done'")

Bash(curl -s -X POST "http://localhost:3456/eval?target=712C6EC4F6B9372F9F84C86F7F1EF025" -d "var ta = document.getElementById\('description'\); var nativeTextareaSetter = Object.getOwnPropertyDescriptor\(window.HTMLTextAreaElement.prototype, 'value'\).set; nativeTextareaSetter.call\(ta, '安全通论实验2 - 图查询与图算法：yago数据集，包含person和movie节点及produce关系'\); ta.dispatchEvent\(new Event\('input', { bubbles: true }\)\); 'done'")

Bash(curl -s -X POST "http://localhost:3456/eval?target=712C6EC4F6B9372F9F84C86F7F1EF025" -d "Array.from\(document.querySelectorAll\('button'\)\).map\(b => \({text: b.textContent.trim\(\), class: b.className?.toString\(\)?.substring\(0,60\), disabled: b.disabled}\)\).filter\(b => b.text\)")

Bash(curl -s -X POST "http://localhost:3456/eval?target=712C6EC4F6B9372F9F84C86F7F1EF025" -d "var btns = document.querySelectorAll\('button.ant-btn-primary'\); var createBtn = null; for \(var i = 0; i < btns.length; i++\) { if \(btns[i].textContent.trim\(\) === '创 建'\) { createBtn = btns[i]; break; } } if \(createBtn\) { createBtn.click\(\); 'clicked create'; } else { 'not found: ' + btns.length + ' buttons'; }")

Bash(curl -s -X POST "http://localhost:3456/eval?target=712C6EC4F6B9372F9F84C86F7F1EF025" -d "document.querySelectorAll\('.ant-modal, .ant-drawer, .ant-modal-mask'\).length + ' modals visible; ' + document.querySelectorAll\('button'\).length + ' buttons total; hash=' + window.location.hash")

Bash(curl -s -X POST "http://localhost:3456/eval?target=712C6EC4F6B9372F9F84C86F7F1EF025" -d "var modals = document.querySelectorAll\('.ant-modal, .ant-modal-mask'\); modals.length + ' modals; projects=' + document.querySelectorAll\('.ant-tugraph-empty-project___ANKDr'\).length + ' empty; btns=' + document.querySelectorAll\('button'\).length")

Bash(curl -s -X POST "http://localhost:3456/eval?target=712C6EC4F6B9372F9F84C86F7F1EF025" -d "var modals = document.querySelectorAll\('.ant-modal, .ant-modal-mask'\); modals.length + ' modals; empty=' + document.querySelectorAll\('.ant-tugraph-empty-project___ANKDr'\).length")

Bash(curl -s -X POST "http://localhost:3456/eval?target=712C6EC4F6B9372F9F84C86F7F1EF025" -d "var modal = document.querySelector\('.ant-modal'\); modal ? modal.querySelector\('.ant-modal-title, .ant-modal-header, :first-child'\).textContent.trim\(\).substring\(0,100\) : 'no modal'")

Bash(curl -s -X POST "http://localhost:3456/eval?target=712C6EC4F6B9372F9F84C86F7F1EF025" -d "var inputs = document.querySelectorAll\('input:not\([type=hidden]\), textarea'\); var result = []; for \(var i = 0; i < inputs.length; i++\) { result.push\({id: inputs[i].id, placeholder: inputs[i].placeholder, value: inputs[i].value, tag: inputs[i].tagName, maxlength: inputs[i].maxLength}\); } JSON.stringify\(result\)")

Bash(curl -s -X POST "http://localhost:3456/eval?target=712C6EC4F6B9372F9F84C86F7F1EF025" -d "var btns = document.querySelectorAll\('.ant-modal button, .ant-modal .ant-btn'\); var result = []; for \(var i = 0; i < btns.length; i++\) { result.push\({text: btns[i].textContent.trim\(\), disabled: btns[i].disabled}\); } JSON.stringify\(result\)")

Bash(curl -s -X POST "http://localhost:3456/eval?target=712C6EC4F6B9372F9F84C86F7F1EF025" -d "var modal = document.querySelector\('.ant-modal'\); modal ? modal.innerText.substring\(0, 1500\) : 'no modal'")

Bash(curl -s -X POST "http://localhost:3456/eval?target=712C6EC4F6B9372F9F84C86F7F1EF025" -d "var cards = document.querySelectorAll\('.ant-modal .ant-card, .ant-modal [class*=template], .ant-modal [class*=card], .ant-modal .ant-radio-wrapper, .ant-modal [class*=Template]'\); cards.length + ' cards found'")

Bash(curl -s -X POST "http://localhost:3456/eval?target=712C6EC4F6B9372F9F84C86F7F1EF025" -d "var items = document.querySelectorAll\('.ant-modal [class*=templateItem], .ant-modal [class*=TemplateItem], .ant-modal [class*=stepItem]'\); if \(items.length === 0\) { var all = document.querySelectorAll\('.ant-modal-body *'\); var texts = []; for \(var i = 0; i < Math.min\(all.length, 60\); i++\) { var el = all[i]; if \(el.children.length === 0 && el.textContent.trim\(\)\) { texts.push\(el.tagName + ':' + el.textContent.trim\(\).substring\(0,30\)\); } } JSON.stringify\(texts\); } else { items.length + ' items' }")

Bash(curl -s -X POST "http://localhost:3456/eval?target=712C6EC4F6B9372F9F84C86F7F1EF025" -d "var divs = document.querySelectorAll\('.ant-modal-body div'\); for \(var i = 0; i < divs.length; i++\) { if \(divs[i].textContent.trim\(\) === '空模版' && divs[i].children.length === 0\) { var parent = divs[i].parentElement; parent.click\(\); 'clicked parent: ' + parent.className.toString\(\).substring\(0,80\); break; } }")

Bash(curl -s -X POST "http://localhost:3456/eval?target=712C6EC4F6B9372F9F84C86F7F1EF025" -d "var walker = document.createTreeWalker\(document.querySelector\('.ant-modal-body'\), NodeFilter.SHOW_ELEMENT\); var node; var results = []; while \(node = walker.nextNode\(\)\) { if \(node.textContent.trim\(\) === '空模版' && node.children.length <= 1\) { var info = {tag: node.tagName, class: node.className?.toString\(\)?.substring\(0,80\), parentTag: node.parentElement.tagName, parentClass: node.parentElement.className?.toString\(\)?.substring\(0,80\), clickable: typeof node.onclick}; results.push\(info\); } } JSON.stringify\(results\)")

Bash(curl -s -X POST "http://localhost:3456/eval?target=712C6EC4F6B9372F9F84C86F7F1EF025" -d "var all = document.querySelectorAll\('.ant-modal-body *'\); var found = []; for \(var i = 0; i < all.length; i++\) { var el = all[i]; if \(el.textContent.includes\('空模版'\) && el.children.length <= 3\) { found.push\({tag: el.tagName, class: el.className?.toString\(\)?.substring\(0,100\), idx: i, children: el.children.length, grandParentClass: el.parentElement?.parentElement?.className?.toString\(\)?.substring\(0,100\)}\); } if \(found.length >= 5\) break; } JSON.stringify\(found\)")

Bash(curl -s -X POST "http://localhost:3456/eval?target=712C6EC4F6B9372F9F84C86F7F1EF025" -d "var all = document.querySelectorAll\('.ant-modal-body *'\); var found = []; for \(var i = 0; i < all.length; i++\) { var el = all[i]; var txt = el.innerText || ''; if \(txt.trim\(\) === '空模版'\) { found.push\({tag: el.tagName, class: el.className?.toString\(\)?.substring\(0,100\), idx: i, html: el.innerHTML.substring\(0,200\)}\); } if \(found.length >= 5\) break; } JSON.stringify\(found\)")

Bash(curl -s -X POST "http://localhost:3456/eval?target=712C6EC4F6B9372F9F84C86F7F1EF025" -d "var btns = document.querySelectorAll\('.ant-modal button'\); for \(var i = 0; i < btns.length; i++\) { if \(btns[i].textContent.trim\(\) === '下一步'\) { btns[i].click\(\); 'clicked next'; break; } }")

Bash(curl -s -X POST "http://localhost:3456/eval?target=712C6EC4F6B9372F9F84C86F7F1EF025" -d "var btns = document.querySelectorAll\('.ant-modal .ant-btn'\); for\(var i=0;i<btns.length;i++\){var t=btns[i].textContent; if\(t.indexOf\('下一步'\)>=0||t.indexOf\('下'\)>=0\){btns[i].click\(\);'clicked:'+t}}")

Bash(curl -s -X POST "http://localhost:3456/eval?target=712C6EC4F6B9372F9F84C86F7F1EF025" -d "var btns=document.querySelectorAll\('.ant-modal-footer button, .ant-modal .ant-btn'\); var out=[]; for\(var i=0;i<btns.length;i++\){out.push\(i+':'+btns[i].textContent+'|disabled='+btns[i].disabled+'|class='+btns[i].className.substring\(0,40\)\);} JSON.stringify\(out\)")

Bash(curl -s -X POST "http://localhost:3456/eval?target=712C6EC4F6B9372F9F84C86F7F1EF025" -d "var ta=document.getElementById\('description'\); var n=Object.getOwnPropertyDescriptor\(window.HTMLTextAreaElement.prototype,'value'\).set; n.call\(ta,'Security Theory Lab 2 - Graph Query and Algorithm: yago dataset with person/movie nodes and produce edges'\); ta.dispatchEvent\(new Event\('input',{bubbles:true}\)\); 'ok'")

Bash(curl -s -X POST "http://localhost:3456/eval?target=A7115BCA042C1673CBA6E4AAD25EC756" -d "var el; var all=document.querySelectorAll\('*'\); for\(var i=0;i<all.length;i++\){if\(all[i].textContent.indexOf\('前往图查询'\)>=0&&all[i].children.length===0\){el=all[i].parentElement;break;}} if\(el\){el.click\(\);'clicked'}else{'not found'}")
